ocr_findings.description: Image has colored arrow annotations overlaid on the table cells (orange arrows showing data flow); OCR correctly captures cell values but cannot represent the visual arrow overlays — expected limitation for annotated table images

reviewer_notes: Answer explanation page for 解答9-8. All four tables (ア/イ/ウ/エ) with columns 手順/A/B/TMP are correctly captured with accurate numeric values. The explanatory prose identifying option イ as correct is present. Page is correctly classified as exam (answer/explanation continuation of exam questions). Page number 352 confirmed in image.
